calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Aug-31-2010 Off Calendar

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Aug-31-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Change of Name of a Minor.
Dept. 218, Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Jr. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Petitioners Yin Huan Wu and Yong Yao Huang were present in pro per as Guardians ad Litem for the minor, Guo Kang Huang.
Petitioners were placed under oath and examined.
Jieying Ming was placed under oath and served as Cantonese speaking interpreter for petitioner.
Proof of Publication in the file.

No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct and sufficient, and that the petition should be granted.

The Court grants the petition for Change of Name of the Minor to: Daren Guokang Huang.

Decree Changing Name was submitted to and signed by the Court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Jul-15-2010 Reset To Aug-31-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 218 For Order To Show Cause
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Change of Name of a Minor.
Dept. 218, Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Jr., Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Petitioners Yin Huan Wu and Yong Huang were present in pro per as Guardians ad Litem for the minor.
Petitioners was placed under oath and examined.
Zhi Zhi Ye was placed under oath and served as Cantonese speaking interpreter for petitioners.
Proof of Publication in the file, but there is a typographical error in the publication.

Good cause appearing, this matter is continued to August 31, 2010 @ 9:00 a.m. in Department 218. Petitioners were advised to seek assistance at the Access Center.
